design_philosophy: E1: Emotion First. A file cleaner app must evoke trust, clarity, and precision. Deleting data is anxiety-inducing; therefore, the UI must feel like a perfectly organized, brightly lit control room. We mix Swiss Brutalist precision (for data truth) with Soft Utility (rounded tactile surfaces) to make destructive actions feel safe and deliberate.

typography.strategy: The Anti-Default Rule. We avoid generic system sans. Headings use structured but approachable sans, while body text uses a sterile, technical sans for file paths and sizes.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous mobile spacing. Elements must not feel cramped, especially when comparing files.

buttons.primary: bg-primary_cobalt text-white rounded-full py-4 px-6 font-bold text-center w-full
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive_red text-white rounded-full py-4 px-6 font-bold text-center w-full shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(255,59,48,0.39)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F4F4F5] text-[#0A0A0A] rounded-full py-4 px-6 font-bold text-center w-full

cards_bento.style: bg-white rounded-3xl p-5 border border-black/5 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]
cards_bento.usage: Dashboard stats (Total scanned, Storage saved), File connection sources.

bottom_sheet.style: bg-white rounded-t-[32px] shadow-[0_-10px_40px_rgb(0,0,0,0.1)] px-6 pb-10 pt-4
bottom_sheet.usage: Use for all context actions: File preview, Bulk delete confirmation, AI rename approval. Avoid full screen navigation for micro-tasks.

file_duplicate_group.style: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-black/10 overflow-hidden mb-6
file_duplicate_group.header: bg-gray-50 px-5 py-3 border-b border-black/5 flex justify-between items-center

auth.layout: Full height. Abstract geometric background behind a bottom heavy login sheet.

dashboard.layout: Scrollable. Top: Large typographic greeting + Total storage recoverable in H1. Middle: Bento grid of connected sources (Internal, GDrive, Dropbox). Bottom: 'Start Smart Scan' primary CTA sticky at bottom.

scan_progress.layout: Centered massive progress circle (Cobalt). Abstract 3D storage connected graphic in the background.
scan_progress.typography: Running file paths rapidly changing below the circle in IBM Plex Sans (text-xs text-gray-400).

duplicate_resolver.layout: List of 'Duplicate Groups'. Each group uses 'file_duplicate_group' component showing side-by-side comparison of metadata (Size, Date, Dimensions) to justify the 'Most Comprehensive' auto-selection. Sticky 'Bulk Delete' button at bottom.

ai_rename_flow.layout: Tinder-like cards or vertical list of 'ai_rename_card'. Shows Generic Name (e.g., 'IMG_0023.jpg') -> AI Suggestion ('Paris_Trip_Eiffel_Tower.jpg'). Approve/Reject buttons.

image_urls.description: Abstract geometric composition with stacked frosted glass layers and blue accents. Use for Login/Signup screen background.
image_urls.placement: Full bleed background on Auth screen under the login bottom sheet.
Use when scanning is complete and zero duplicates/generic files are found. 'You are perfectly organized' state.

image_urls.description: Abstract 3D interconnected geometric floating data blocks.
image_urls.placement: Use on the 'Scan Progress' screen or 'Connect Storage' empty state.

icons_strategy: Use Phosphor Icons (phosphor-react-native or expo/vector-icons equivalent). They provide a highly legible, technical look perfect for file extensions and UI actions.

testing_instructions.requirement: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (or `testID` in React Native) to facilitate robust automated testing.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native app. Apply the Tailwind classes using NativeWind or translate them to StyleSheet objects.
Ensure the fonts Manrope and IBM Plex Sans are loaded via expo-font.
Never use generic HTML elements (div, span) in RN. Use View, Text, TouchableOpacity.
For the duplicate groups, ensure the visual hierarchy clearly differentiates between the file to KEEP (Cobalt highlight) and the files to DELETE (Red highlight).
Use the provided image_urls for backgrounds and empty states. Do not use generic placeholders.
